evals.name: staurosporine_dereplication_and_producer
evals.prompt: Is staurosporine a known natural product, and what organism produces it?
expected_facts: Known microbial natural product, NPAtlas ID NPA014588
Produced by Streptomyces (genus; Bacteria > Actinobacteria > Streptomycetaceae)

evals.name: staurosporine_chemont_class
evals.prompt: What ChemOnt chemical class is staurosporine (InChIKey HKSZLNNOFSGOKW-FYTWVXJKSA-N)?

evals.name: formula_dereplication_isomer_ambiguity
evals.prompt: Dereplicate a metabolomics feature with molecular formula C28H26N4O3 (exact mass ~466.20) against known microbial natural products. Is the identity unique?
expected_facts: NPAtlas formula search returns 2 isomeric hits at exact mass 466.2005
Formula/exact mass alone is NOT a unique identification; an InChIKey or MS/MS is needed to disambiguate isomers
